name: Druva
description: Monitor Druva cloud data protection and backup platform for storage, devices, admin users, backup sets, and audit logs

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Client ID from Druva Cloud Platform Console > API Credentials

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Secret Key from Druva Cloud Platform Console > API Credentials

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that all devices managed by Druva are properly secured and backed up

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews admin user access and permissions in Druva platform

checks.name: Backup logs
checks.description: Verifies that backup operations are logged and monitored

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Provides inventory of devices and storage managed by Druva

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that monitoring and alerting is configured for backup operations
